nasb.text: We also placed ourselves under obligation to contribute yearly one third of a shekel for the service of the house of our God:

esv.text: “We also take on ourselves the obligation to give yearly a third part of a shekel for the service of the house of our God:

cnv.text: 我們又為自己立下法規，各人每年要繳納四克銀子作我們　神的殿的經費，

ccb.text: 我们为自己定下律例，每人每年捐献四克银子，供我们上帝的殿使用，
